app.name: qbit
app.one_liner: An open-source, agentic terminal application for macOS that integrates AI workflows with local development tools, emphasizing user control and transparency.

screens.name: Git Integration
screens.purpose: Perform version control operations directly within the agentic terminal interface.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Organize workspaces with project shortcuts and quick access to recent directories.

screens.name: Model Selection
screens.purpose: Select and configure AI models including advanced variants like GPT-5.4 with reasoning effort options.

screens.name: Sub-Agent Details
screens.purpose: Inspect and debug modular agent workflows with visual sub-agent architecture.

rust_commands.name: delete_project
rust_commands.purpose: Delete a project shortcut and associated metadata.

rust_commands.name: remove_recent_dir
rust_commands.purpose: Remove a recently accessed directory from the home screen list.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist project or workspace metadata locally.

rust_commands.name: stream_ai_response
rust_commands.purpose: Handle resilient streaming of AI responses with retry logic on stream start failures.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build home screen with project management actions
week 1: Implement core Rust backend with Tauri integration
week 1: Integrate unified timeline for AI and terminal output
acceptance_tests: AI response streaming recovers from initial connection failures
Custom OpenAI endpoints are configurable and functional
Git operations are accessible and functional within the UI
GPT-5.4 model with reasoning effort variants is selectable
User can add and remove project shortcuts from the home screen
